language.title: Select Language
language.subtitle: Choose your language to continue
language.hint: You can change language later from Profile screen.

profile.title: Profile
profile.phoneHint: No need to add a leading 0. Country code is on the left.
profile.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters, and include upper/lowercase letters, numbers and symbols.

alert.saveSuccess: Your profile information has been updated.
alert.savedLocalButBackendFailed: Profile was saved, but it could not be written to the server.

verify.codeSentText: A verification code was sent to your phone (simulation).
verify.verifySuccess: Your phone number has been verified.

avatar.label: Profile photo
avatar.readError: Selected image could not be read.
avatar.pickError: There was a problem selecting profile photo. Please try again.

onboarding.restartMessage: You are about to restart the short intro tour. Continue?
onboarding.readyMessage: The onboarding will open again in a moment. At the end of the tour, you’ll return to the app.

invite.title: Find me on Viral
invite.platformQuestion: Which platform do you want to share on?

accounts.connectedFlash: Your {{label}} account has been connected to Viral.
accounts.disconnectedFlash: Your {{label}} account has been removed from Viral.
accounts.hintConnected: You can remove this account from Viral or update its connection.
accounts.hintDisconnected: To connect this account to Viral, enter the profile or page URL.
accounts.enterLink: First enter the link of the account you want to connect.

activities.empty: There is no card associated with your name yet. When you add task cards or videos to the feed, you’ll see their summaries here.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.confirmBody: This action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?
delete.finalBody: Your account will be permanently deleted.

mode.taskDescription: You can select one of the tasks you completed and share it as a card.
mode.freeDescription: You are currently creating a free share card without choosing a task.
mode.noCompletedTasksInline: You don’t have any completed tasks yet. First complete a task from the Tasks screen.
mode.noCompletedTasksBody: There are no completed tasks at the moment. To switch to task mode, complete a task first.

fields.cardDescriptionPlaceholder: Task description or free share text... (optional)

video.label: Video (optional)
video.hint: In the free version videos can be up to 30 seconds. The app currently supports videos up to 3 minutes.
video.tooLongBody: Currently only videos up to 3 minutes are supported. Please shorten your video and try again.
video.overFreeLimitBody: In the free version, the video you want to send must be shorter than 30 seconds. You’ll be able to explore the Pro option for longer videos.
video.proInfoBody: You are currently at the planning stage of Pro features. As you get closer to launch, you’ll detail Pro and long-video support. 🚀
video.pickErrorBody: An error occurred while selecting video. Please try again.

share.freePostTip: You can also share without a task. Freely share your videos, moments and anything you like; they’ll appear as independent cards in the feed.
share.platformNotConnectedBody: To share on {{platform}}, you must connect your {{platform}} account to Viral.
share.goProfileBody: Go to the “Profile” tab and connect your {{platform}} account from the “Account connections” section.

alerts.missingContentBody: Select a task or add a title / description / video before creating the card.
alerts.successTaskBody: Task card has been shared in the feed.
alerts.successFreeBody: Your free share card has been added to the feed.

modes.givenDescription: Request a surprise task; Viral chooses one for you.
modes.selfDescription: You can add tasks for yourself on this page.

self.scheduleQuestion: When will you do this task?

focus-25min.title: Focus for 25 minutes
focus-25min.description: Silence your phone and focus on a single task for 25 minutes.

focus-deep-clean.title: Mini desk / workspace clean-up
focus-deep-clean.description: Collect unnecessary items on your desk; create a 10-minute “fresh start” effect.

focus-inbox-zero.title: Lighten your inbox
focus-inbox-zero.description: Delete or archive at least 5 unnecessary emails today.

focus-no-scroll-20min.title: 20-minute “no scroll” rule
focus-no-scroll-20min.description: Spend 20 minutes without scrolling any social media feed.

health-steps-6000.title: Take 6000 steps today
health-steps-6000.description: Plan short walks outside; reach at least 6000 steps in total.

health-water-6.title: Drink at least 6 glasses of water
health-water-6.description: Spread your water intake throughout the day and track it.

health-stretch-10.title: 10-minute stretch break
health-stretch-10.description: Do simple stretch exercises for your neck, shoulders and lower back.

health-walk-sunset.title: Evening mini walk
health-walk-sunset.description: Take a 15-minute fresh-air walk around sunset.

work-priority-task.title: Finish your most important task
work-priority-task.description: Choose today’s most important task, break it into smaller steps and complete it.

work-no-meeting-30.title: 30-minute meeting-free block
work-no-meeting-30.description: Create a 30-minute silent focus block in your calendar and avoid scheduling meetings in it.

work-feedback-ask.title: Ask for feedback
work-feedback-ask.description: Ask a teammate for brief feedback on a piece of work you did.

work-small-win-share.title: Note today’s small win
work-small-win-share.description: Write down in one sentence the work / progress that made you happiest today.

school-25min-study.title: 25 minutes of study / review
school-25min-study.description: Focus on only one subject; study 25 minutes without touching your phone.

school-question-solve.title: Solve at least 10 questions
school-question-solve.description: Solve at least 10 new questions today from a subject you choose.

school-notes-clean.title: Organize your notes
school-notes-clean.description: Clean up one topic in your notebook / digital notes and add headings.

school-share-tip.title: Send a study tip to a friend
school-share-tip.description: Share a study technique you use (Pomodoro, colorful notes, etc.) with a friend.

family-call-parent.title: Short chat with family
family-call-parent.description: Have at least a 5-minute sincere conversation with a parent or family member.

family-eat-together.title: Eat together
family-eat-together.description: Have a meal with your family at the same table without phones.

family-thank-message.title: Send a thank-you message
family-thank-message.description: Write a short “I’m glad you’re here” message to someone from your family.

social-message-friend.title: Send a message to a friend
social-message-friend.description: Ask “How are you?” to someone you haven’t spoken to for a long time.

social-comment-support.title: Leave a supportive comment
social-comment-support.description: Write a sincere, supportive comment on a friend’s post.

social-share-win.title: Share today’s “small win”
social-share-win.description: Get ready to save a moment that made you happy today as a card.

social-new-connection.title: Create a new connection
social-new-connection.description: Send a short hello message to someone you’ve followed for a long time but never written to.

social-phone-free-coffee.title: Phone-free coffee / tea break
social-phone-free-coffee.description: Spend a 15-minute coffee break with a friend or alone without your phone.

viral-plan-card.title: Plan a Viral card
viral-plan-card.description: Think of a card idea for a moment, note or goal you want to share today and write its title.

viral-gratitude-3.title: Be grateful for 3 things
viral-gratitude-3.description: Write down 3 things you are grateful for today as short notes; you can turn them into a card if you like.

viral-before-after.title: Find a before / after photo idea
viral-before-after.description: Find something you can show “before–after”, such as desk organization, screen clean-up or a walking route.

request.areaTitle: Get today’s task as a surprise.
request.areaSubtitle: Press the button and Viral chooses a ready task for you.
request.changeUsedLabel: You’ve used your change for today

requestAlerts.noMoreChangesTitle: Your limit for today is reached
requestAlerts.noMoreChangesBody: You can change the ready task at most once per day. You can get a new task tomorrow. 🙌
requestAlerts.alreadyChangedBody: You have already changed today’s task once.

sections.activeEmpty: There are no active tasks at the moment. You can add a new task.
sections.completedEmpty: No tasks have been completed yet.
sections.completedShowLess: You’re viewing all – Show only last 3

alerts.clearCompletedBody:
All completed tasks will be deleted. Active tasks will remain.

Are you sure?
alerts.deleteTaskBody: Do you want to remove this task only from the Tasks screen, or also delete the cards created from this task in the Feed?

completeModal.title: Task completed 🎉
completeModal.text: If you want, you can share this task as a card in the Feed.

pro.title: Assign a task to a friend (Pro)
pro.body: Coming soon: you’ll be able to assign tasks to people from your friends list and send them notifications. This feature will be for Viral Pro users.
pro.alertBody: You are in the planning phase for Pro features. As the app gets closer to launch, you’ll clarify the details. 🚀

sharePanel.title: Share
sharePanel.infoText: You can share on external platforms using your connected accounts. Platforms may open their own share screens.
sharePanel.shareBody: You can share on external platforms using your connected accounts.
sharePanel.noAccounts:
You haven't connected any accounts yet.
Please connect accounts before sharing.
sharePanel.connectFallbackBody: You can add external accounts from the "Connect Accounts" section in your profile.
sharePanel.infoBody: You see a summary below to share cards created on Viral to your connected accounts. In this version, sharing is informational; you must open the relevant app for actual sharing.
sharePanel.shareAllBody: We assume you shared on your connected accounts. Sharing is simulated in this version.

requireAccounts.title: Connect your accounts
requireAccounts.desc: To share on external platforms, you must connect your accounts first.
requireAccounts.desc2: You can add your external accounts from the "Connect my accounts" section on your profile screen.

feed.headerTagline: Your tasks, videos and shares — all meet here.

share.simulationMessage: We assume that a share was made on {{platform}}.
share.errorMessage: Sharing was cancelled or an error occurred.
share.noAccountsBody: To share on external platforms, you need to connect your accounts first.
share.goProfileBody: On the Profile screen, use the “Connect my accounts” section to add your external accounts.

video.info: 📹 A video is planned with this card.

comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first one 🙂
comments.disabledMessage: Comments are turned off for this post.
comments.disabledInfo: Comments are turned off for this post. You can only view existing comments.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: You don’t have any notifications yet. As you comment and play with settings, your notifications will appear here.
notifications.commentsToggle: You {{state}} comments for the post titled “{{title}}”.
notifications.addedComment: You added a comment to the post titled “{{title}}”.

freeVideo.title: Video
freeVideo.message: What do you want to do with this video?

postActions.title: Post actions
postActions.message: What would you like to do with this post?
postActions.noPermission: This card isn't yours. You can't delete it.

report.successMessage: This post has been reported for review.
report.errorMessage: Report could not be sent. Please try again.

block.confirmMessage: {{author}} will no longer appear in your feed.
block.successMessage: Posts from this user will no longer appear in your feed.
block.errorMessage: User could not be blocked. Please try again.

switch.title: Switch user
switch.body: Fields will be cleared. Email/phone + password are required to sign in.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email/phone and password.
login.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

register.subtitle: Registration form for real users.
register.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and include upper/lowercase letters, a number, and a symbol.
register.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
register.cta: Already have an account? Sign in

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: You can receive a verification code using your registered email address or phone number.
forgot.verifySubtitle: Enter the verification code and your new password.

focusNetwork.title: Focus Network
focusNetwork.subtitle: Here you only see posts from people you selected.

note.backendDiscover: Note: The discover list comes from the backend. If there is no connection, results may not update.

detail.rule1: • Friendship system: send request → other side accepts.
detail.rule2: • No forced connection. Everything proceeds with approval.
detail.rule3: • If there is no connection, actions may fail.

alerts.loginRequiredBody: A user session is required for this action.
alerts.alreadyInNetworkBody: This person is already in your Focus Network.
alerts.pendingBody: You already sent a request to this person. Wait for them to accept it.
alerts.requestExistsBody: This person has already sent you a request. You can accept it from the “Requests” tab.
